threadName: Free Fire tournament app development plan

messages.content:
Create a complete Free Fire Tournament App (mobile + web compatible) with the following features:

📱 Tech Stack:
- Frontend: React / Flutter (mobile-friendly UI)
- Backend: Node.js / PHP (REST API)
- Database: MySQL / Firebase
- Authentication: JWT / Firebase Auth

🎮 Core Features:

1. User System:
- User registration & login (email, phone, OTP)
- User profile (IGN, UID, game stats)
- Wallet system (add balance, withdraw)

2. Tournament System:
- Create Free Fire tournaments (solo, duo, squad)
- Join tournaments (free & paid entry)
- Slot booking system
- Match timing & reminders

3. Admin Panel:
- Create / edit / delete tournaments
- Manage users & payments
- Approve withdrawals
- Upload match results

4. Match System:
- Auto-generate Room ID & Password
- Show match details only to registered players
- Upload results (kills, rank, points)

5. Leaderboard:
- Real-time leaderboard update
- Ranking based on kills + placement
- Prize distribution system

6. Payment Integration:
- UPI / Razorpay / Paytm integration
- In-app wallet transactions
- Entry fee deduction & winnings credit

7. Notifications:
- Push notifications for match time
- Result announcements
- Tournament updates

8. UI/UX:
- Gaming style UI (dark theme)
- Dashboard with upcoming matches
- Easy navigation (Home, Tournaments, Wallet, Profile)

9. Security:
- Anti-cheat checks
- Secure APIs
- Admin verification system

10. Extra Features:
- Referral system
- Daily rewards / spin wheel
- Chat or support system

📂 Output Required:
- Full source code (frontend + backend)
- Database schema (tables for users, tournaments, matches, transactions)
- API endpoints list
- Installation guide (step-by-step)
- Sample test data

⚡ Bonus:
- Add multi-game support (BGMI, COD, Valorant)
- Add analytics dashboard for admin
Perfect! I'll create a complete Free Fire Tournament App. Since the repository creation is in progress, let me set up all the necessary files and structure.
